title: Global Steel Output Remains Strong Outside China
section_path: Global Steel Output Remains Strong Outside China
section_path_text: Global Steel Output Remains Strong Outside China
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Global crude steel production totaled 142.7 million tons in February. This is down month-on-month by 12.3 million tons (-8%) and is 7.5 million tons (-5%) less than was reported last year for February 2021's production. The year-on-year contraction has remained mostly due to the contraction in China.
